title: The Goalie's Anxiety at the Penalty Kick
original_title: Die Angst des Tormanns beim Elfmeter
overview: Goalkeeper Josef Bloch is sent off after committing a foul during an away game. This causes him to lose his bearings, and he wanders aimlessly through the city streets and spends the night with the box-office attendant of a movie theatre.

trailers.title: [빔 벤더스 감독전] '페널티킥 앞에 선 골키퍼의 불안' 메인 예고편
